message:
fix(api): standardize HTTP status codes across endpoints

- DELETE /reservations/:id now returns 204 No Content
- DELETE /sessions/:id/checkpoints/:id now returns 204 No Content
- DELETE /dcg/allowlist/:ruleId now returns 204 No Content
- POST /conflicts/:id/resolve returns 400 if already resolved
- Add sendNoContent() helper to response utilities

Implements flywheel_gateway-9wx

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
